imageMessage.caption:
*You have enough time to make things happen.*

 *"I will do it" is not doing it!*

messageStubParameters: No session found to decrypt message

extendedTextMessage.text:
🔄 *KeepAlive Status*

• Status: *Active*
• Webview: *Running*
• Ping Interval: *Every 5 minutes*

The keepalive system prevents the bot from sleeping by periodically pinging itself.

This feature runs through the webview and doesn't affect bot functionality.
